title: Saro´s Parkour Blocks Remastered
description: Enhance your Minecraft parkour experience with customizable blocks featuring movement patterns and potion effects for dynamic challenges
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Parkour_Blocks_Remastered/MP_SarosParkourBlocksRemastered_header.webp)

## About

Saro's Parkour Blocks Remastered is a Minecraft mod that adds special parkour blocks to enhance your parkour experience. These blocks have special properties, making them perfect for creating parkour challenges, puzzle maps, or adding unique elements to your builds.

**Coming Soon**: The ability to disguise parkour blocks as any other block in the game, allowing you to create hidden parkour challenges!

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Parkour_Blocks_Remastered/MP_SarosParkourBlocksRemastered_description.webp)

## Features

### Parkour Blocks
- **Unique Appearance**: Parkour blocks have a distinctive appearance, making them identifiable in your builds.
- **Effect Application**: Apply various potion effects to players who step on the blocks.
- **Movement System**: Create blocks that move in custom patterns, perfect for creating dynamic parkour challenges.

### Block Effects
- **Jump Boost**: Enhance your jumping ability
- **Speed Boost**: Move faster
- **Slow Falling**: Float gently to the ground
- **Levitation**: Float upwards
- **And more!**: Any potion effect in the game can be applied

### Movement System
- **Custom Paths**: Create blocks that move along custom paths
- **Timing Control**: Set the timing for each movement step
- **Looping Patterns**: Create repeating movement patterns
- **Destroy Mode**: Option to destroy blocks in the path or push them

### User Interface
- **Intuitive GUI**: Easy-to-use interface for configuring blocks
- **Effect Selection**: Simple dropdown menu for selecting effects
- **Movement Editor**: Visual editor for creating movement paths

## Crafting

Check JEI/REI for the crafting recipe of the Parkour Block.

## How to Use

1. Craft a Parkour Block (recipe visible in JEI/REI)
2. Place the block in your world
3. Right-click the block to open the configuration GUI
4. Set up effects and movement patterns as desired
5. Enjoy your custom parkour experience!


![Video](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Parkour_Blocks_Remastered/MP_SarosParkourBlocksRemastered_video.webp)
